label: Spiking neurons & temporal coding

node.label: Spiking neurons & temporal coding
node.definition: Sparse events and membrane dynamics encode and process information in continuous or discrete time.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Spiking neurons & temporal coding is to connect Dynamical systems & control theory, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Spiking neural networks, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
examples: substrate for Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Dynamical systems & control theory, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: Spiking neurons & temporal coding uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Spiking neurons & temporal coding uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Spiking neurons & temporal coding uses Signal processing & harmonic analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
